title: All Creatures of Our God and King
author: St. Francis of Assisi (tr. William H. Draper)
story: Francis of Assisi composed 'Canticle of the Sun' near the end of his life, nearly blind. Draper's English translation set to the German melody captures Francis's joyful creation theology.

lines: All creatures of our God and King Lift up your voice and with us sing, O praise Him
Alleluia
Thou fire so masterful and bright, Praise God and on Him cast your care
Let all things their Creator bless, And worship Him in humbleness, O praise Him
Alleluia
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son, And praise the Spirit, Three in One
Thou rushing wind that art so strong Ye clouds that sail in Heaven along, O praise Him
Alleluia
The flowers and fruits that in thee grow, O praise Him
Alleluia
Alleluia
Alleluia
Let all things their Creator bless, And worship Him in humbleness, O praise Him
Alleluia
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son, And praise the Spirit, Three in One
Thou flowing water, pure and clear, Make music for thy Lord to hear, O sing ye
Alleluia
Ye who long pain and sorrow bear, 6
And thou most kind and gentle Death, 7
Let all things their Creator bless, And worship Him in humbleness, O praise Him
Alleluia
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son, And praise the Spirit, Three in One
Dear mother earth, who day by day Unfoldest blessings on our way, Thou silver moon with softer gleam
O praise Him
Waiting to hush our latest breath, 7
Let all things their Creator bless, And worship Him in humbleness, O praise Him
Alleluia
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son, And praise the Spirit, Three in One
And all ye men of tender heart, Forgiving others, take your part, Ye lights of evening, find a voice
O praise Him
Alleluia
Let all things their Creator bless, And worship Him in humbleness, O praise Him
Alleluia
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son, And praise the Spirit, Three in One
Alleluia
Alleluia
Thou burning sun with golden beam, That givest man both warmth and light
Thou leadest home the child of God, 7
Let all things their Creator bless, And worship Him in humbleness, O praise Him
Alleluia
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son, And praise the Spirit, Three in One
O praise Him
Alleluia
Thou rising moon, in praise rejoice, Let them His glory also show
And Christ our Lord the way hath trod
Let all things their Creator bless, And worship Him in humbleness, O praise Him
Alleluia
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son, And praise the Spirit, Three in One
